name: Jayaraman R
text: My Infosys journey starts with mentor with golden voice RANJITH. Don't have rules but have process. Providing support and pass on knowledge and experience with constructive feedback which helps to find our own answer. Thanks and all the best for the future endeavor

name: Prashanth Nair
text: All the best for your next chapter, Ranjith! It's been great working with you. I really enjoyed the chats we used to have about projects and work. I'll also remember the lunch we had together and the party we had on your last day in Auckland. Wishing you lots of success and happiness ahead

name: Srivalli Chikkala
text: Hi K.Ranjith All the best.It has been great working with you.Thank you for all your support and collaboration throughout the project. Hope we get the chance to work together again!
